description_long: This house features a sprawling, multi-wing layout with a combination of pitched and gable roofs, surrounded by landscaped greenery and several trees. The structure includes multiple visible entryways, a central courtyard or patio area, and a mix of attached and detached sections. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, providing ample natural light and visual interest. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or painted siding, with some areas featuring stone or concrete accents. The property includes paved walkways, a driveway, and a garage, suggesting a suburban or upscale residential context. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and functional living areas.
description: A large, multi-wing house with pitched roofs, landscaped grounds, and a central courtyard, featuring asymmetrical windows and multiple entryways. The exterior is light-colored with stone or concrete accents, blending modern and traditional styles.
description_view_0: Front-facing view showing the main entryway, central courtyard, and landscaped front yard with trees and pathways.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, garage area, and the arrangement of multiple rooflines and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional entry points, and more of the landscaped garden and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the length of the house, secondary entryways, and the integration of greenery and paved areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, steps, and a prominent door, flanked by landscaped elements and paved walkways.
